```python
def compute_prefix_function(s):
    n = len(s)
    pi = [0] * n
    for i in range(1, n):
        j = pi[i - 1]
        while j > 0 and s[i] != s[j]:
            j = pi[j - 1]
        if s[i] == s[j]:
            j += 1
        pi[i] = j
    return pi

def shortest_palindrome(s):
    rev_s = s[::-1]
    combined = s + '#' + rev_s
    pi = compute_prefix_function(combined)
    max_overlap = pi[-1]
    return s + rev_s[:len(s) - max_overlap]

def main():
    import sys
    input_str = sys.stdin.read().strip()
    print(shortest_palindrome(input_str))

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
```
